name: AccountCategoryOperationContracts
description: Concrete request, result, and stable domain-error contracts for account and category operations.
schema_def: All operations use the common OperationDescriptor envelopes. Mutations require --idempotency-key.
- input: {institutionName, displayName, accountType: cheque|savings|credit_card|other_asset|other_liability, maskedIdentifier, currencyCode: ZAR}
- result AccountDetail: {accountId, institutionName, displayName, accountType, accountClass: asset|liability, maskedIdentifier, currencyCode, status, createdActor, createdAt}
- errors: LEDGER-ACCOUNT-DUPLICATE exit5; LEDGER-ACCOUNT-TYPE-UNSUPPORTED exit3; LEDGER-CURRENCY-UNSUPPORTED exit3
- result: AccountDetail plus history[] when requested
- result: {items: AccountSummary[]} ordered by institutionName, displayName, accountId
- errors: LEDGER-ACCOUNT-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-ACCOUNT-ARCHIVED exit6; LEDGER-ACCOUNT-NAME-CONFLICT exit5
- result CategoryDetail: {categoryId, name, status, createdActor, createdAt}
- result: CategoryDetail plus history[] when requested
- result: {items: CategorySummary[]} ordered by name, categoryId
- errors: LEDGER-CATEGORY-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-CATEGORY-ARCHIVED exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-NAME-CONFLICT exit5
- errors: LEDGER-CATEGORY-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-CATEGORY-ALREADY-ACTIVE exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-NAME-CONFLICT exit5

Constraints: names are trimmed, non-empty, length-bounded Unicode; accountType fixes the asset/liability economic polarity; maskedIdentifier may contain only masked display data, never a full account number; archive never removes history.
